title: Bare Bones x Flower Tools
description: Replace your Minecraft armor and tools with truly floral ones in the Bare Bones style 🌸
body:
**Flower tools and armor**

Replace your Minecraft armor and tools with truly floral ones in the Bare Bones style 🌸

Part of the Flower Power set 🌸

- Recommended to bundle with the BareBones Texturepack for a better experience!
